proposal1.heroHeadline: Shida is burning 500 hours a year on proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting proposals devours hours of your time, but in 47 seconds, automation can handle it all for your graphic design services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Shida is experiencing ongoing losses that require immediate attention.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Every hour spent crafting proposals manually is an hour lost to designing and servicing clients. Shida loses around 500 hours annually.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Delays in proposal creation can mean missed deadlines. Shida risks losing up to 10% of potential deals due to timing issues.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually created proposals can lack uniformity, risking Shida's brand image. This inconsistency can lead to a 15% dip in client trust.

problems.title: Higher Costs
problems.description: The manual process requires more staff hours, costing Shida an additional $20,000 annually in labor expenses.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Human error in proposals can lead to miscommunication and potential loss of contracts, costing Shida around 5% of potential revenue.

problems.title: Limited Tracking
problems.description: Lack of proper tracking in proposals results in missed follow-ups, bleeding away 7% of Shida's potential conversion rates.

proposal1.solutionIntro: This AI system is the replacement for these costly inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, creating a proposal can take hours. With this system, generate a complete proposal in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes risk inconsistent proposals. Let AI ensure every proposal is branded perfectly every time.

solutions.title: Cost-Effective Operations
solutions.description: Manual labor for proposals adds up. This system cuts labor costs by automating the entire process.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual proposal creation is prone to errors. AI ensures accuracy and clarity in each proposal, enhancing client trust.

solutions.title: Enhanced Tracking
solutions.description: Manual tracking of proposals is limited. This system includes advanced tracking features to optimize follow-ups.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Shida's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Shida around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Shida.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp with Purposeful Graphic Design.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: A tailored plan to transform your brand's visual presence and drive engagement. Let's implement a strategy that resonates.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Current losses hinder Acme Corp's growth potential.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor leaving your site without engagement is a missed opportunity. This could mean thousands in lost revenue monthly.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Lack of cohesive design across platforms dilutes brand identity. This can result in a 20% decrease in brand recognition.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Visitors not converting into customers equates to a significant loss in potential sales. This impacts your bottom line daily.

problems.title: Outdated Visuals
problems.description: Old design elements can make your brand appear behind the times. This may decrease customer trust and engagement by 30%.

problems.title: Poor Social Media Impact
problems.description: Ineffective visuals on social platforms can lead to a 40% drop in engagement, affecting your online community growth.

problems.title: Lack of Visual Strategy
problems.description: Without strategic planning, your visual efforts can feel disjointed. This could mean a loss of clarity in your brand message.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these critical losses.

solutions.title: Comprehensive Brand Design
solutions.description: We create a unified brand presence across all platforms. This builds recognition and trust with your audience.

solutions.title: Conversion-Focused Web Design
solutions.description: Optimized design to turn visitors into customers. Increases conversion rates and enhances user experience.

solutions.title: Engaging Social Media Content
solutions.description: Crafting visuals that captivate and engage your audience. Boosts interaction and community growth.

solutions.title: Visual Strategy Development
solutions.description: Strategic planning for consistent, effective visual communication. Enhances brand message clarity and impact.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Shida's expertise uniquely positions us to refine your brand.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Our clients consistently see measurable improvements in their brand engagement and recognition.

whyUsCards.title: Tailored Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We adapt our strategies to fit your specific needs, ensuring relevance and effectiveness.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Services
whyUsCards.description: From initial concept to final execution, we handle every aspect of the design process.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your brand's goals and values, fostering a collaborative and transparent partnership.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team guiding your brand transformation.

team.name: Kenji Doshida
team.bio: Kenji leads strategy and cultivates strong client relationships. His expertise ensures impactful design solutions.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: Understanding your brand and market landscape.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Crafting a tailored visual strategy for your brand.

process.title: Launch & Optimize
process.description: Deploying designs and refining based on feedback.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Explore our investment options to elevate your brand.
proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how we can bring your vision to life. No commitment needed, just a conversation.

Our team of professionals will keep you informed and involved throughout the entire process. Consider us an extension of your own 'in-house' design department.
